profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Satyamitra Kemas Lestari Tbk operates as an integrated carton packaging and logistics solutions company in Indonesia. It offers corrugated carton, pre-print corrugated, offset printing, and rigid boxes. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Satyamitra Kemas Lestari Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt Satyamitra Investindo Pratama.
